login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to continue your HR system design
login.promo_title: Design your HR system with consulting-grade precision.
login.promo_subtitle: Transform your HR strategy with our step-by-step guided approach. Build organization structures, performance systems, and compensation frameworks.

register.title: Create HR Manager Account
register.subtitle: Register to start designing your HR system
register.password_hint: Use at least 10 characters. Uppercase letters are not required.
register.promo_description: Transform your HR strategy with our step-by-step guided approach. Build organization structures, performance systems, and compensation frameworks with consulting-grade precision.

hero.title: Design Your Precise HR System
hero.description: We revolutionize how SMEs build HR frameworks. Our step-by-step guided approach recreates professional consulting work within a modern SaaS platform.

everything.title: Everything You Need to Build a Complete HR System
everything.description: Our platform guides you through each step with consulting-grade logic and rule-based recommendations.

organization.title: Organization Design
organization.description: Structure your company with functional, team-based, divisional, or matrix organizations.

job_analysis.title: Job Analysis
job_analysis.description: Analyze and define roles, responsibilities, and performance factors for each position.

performance.title: Performance Management System
performance.description: Design KPI, MBO, OKR, or BSC-based performance evaluation frameworks.

compensation.title: Compensation System
compensation.description: Build competitive pay structures through merit, incentives, and role-based differentiation.

why.title: Why Choose HR Path-Finder?
why.description: We replicate the structured approach of professional HR consulting, making it accessible to companies without dedicated HR planning teams.
items: Complete audit trail for all decisions

role_based.title: Role-Based Access
role_based.description: CEO, HR Manager, and Consultant each have specific permissions and views.

visual.title: Visual Dashboard
visual.description: View your entire HR system at a glance with professional visualizations.

validation.title: Logical Validation
validation.description: The system blocks incompatible choices to ensure consistent HR design.

collaboration.title: Collaborative Workflow
collaboration.description: CEO and HR Manager work together with clear handoffs and approvals.

cta.title: Ready to Design Your HR System?
cta.description: Start your free trial today and experience scalable consulting-grade HR design from prototype to full implementation.

hero_revision.badge: The engine that drives organizational growth through HR policy design
hero_revision.sub: Build internal HR capability and get full expert policy design at about one-quarter the cost of traditional consulting.
hero_revision.firm_sub: SaaS by a professional consulting firm
hero_revision.secondary_button: SaaS made by a professional consulting firm, Better Company →

trust_bar.item1: Policy design platform by Better Company, a professional HR consulting firm
trust_bar.item2: Policy design completed within about one month on average
trust_bar.item3: Strong cost advantage over traditional consulting

process.description: Each step feeds the next. When all four steps are complete, an HR consultant certifies your system with a tailored HR system report.

lead.highlight: We precisely sort and structure your company’s HR data

step_01.title: Organization diagnosis
step_01.desc: Diagnose your current organizational structure, job distribution, and headcount composition.

step_02.title: Business philosophy
step_02.desc: Clarify your organization’s core values and strategic direction.

step_03.title: Job analysis
step_03.desc: Systematically align your internal job families and roles.

step_04.title: Performance system design
step_04.desc: Design evaluation processes and goal management based on job characteristics.

step_05.title: Compensation structure design
step_05.desc: Build a competitive compensation structure based on compensation benchmarks.

trust_cards.description:
Pathfinder is not just a form tool. Your inputs become the basis for consultant design, and the result comes back as a reviewed HR system report.

"The system designs; the consultant certifies the report."
trust_cards.card1_desc: Enter organization structure, job definitions, performance framework, and compensation criteria step by step. Faster than handing materials to an external consultant.
trust_cards.card2_desc: A senior HR consultant designs the system to fit your industry, size, and culture using the data you provided.
trust_cards.card3_title: Delivered as an HR system report
trust_cards.card3_desc: A consultant-signed HR system report is delivered as a PDF, ready for immediate use in-house.

benchmark_section.description:
Pathfinder compares your grade- and role-based pay to industry, target competitors, and similar segments. With your company at 100, you see where the market sits.

This analysis is included in the HR system report.
benchmark_section.insight: Your compensation level is about 78% of the overall industry and 85% of target competitors.

cta_block.title: Design your company’s HR system today.
cta_block.description: If your company has 20–300 employees, Pathfinder is the fastest and most expert route to HR system design.

benchmark.title: Compensation Level Relative Index
benchmark.summary: Your company's compensation level is 78% compared to the overall industry and 84% compared to target competitors.

benchmark_card.subtitle: Annual Total Pay Level (Your company = 100) — market comparison

insight.strong: About 22% less competitive vs. the industry
insight.suffix: This analysis is included in your HR system report and delivered to you.

footer.left: As of Q2 2025 · Company size: 74 employees

roi.title: Pathfinder vs. Traditional Consulting
roi.description: The quality of deliverables is the same. What changes is cost, time, and internal capability.

row_2.label: Cost
row_2.bad: Tens of millions KRW ~ hundreds of millions KRW

table.note: * Timeline and cost may vary depending on scope and team involvement.

trust_section.description: The system designs, and consultants validate it in the final report.

seo.title: HR Pathfinder — Expert-Grade HR System Design

landing.better_company: We operate the platform together with Better Company, a practical HR consulting firm.

hr_dashboard.start_building: Start building your company's HR system.
hr_dashboard.get_started_desc: Start your HR system design journey by creating a new project and completing the Diagnosis step.
hr_dashboard.unlock_next: Complete each step to unlock the next one
hr_dashboard.waiting_for_ceo_survey: Waiting for CEO to complete the survey...
hr_dashboard.waiting_for_ceo_survey_desc: Diagnosis has been submitted. All steps are ready but locked until CEO completes the Management Philosophy Survey.
hr_dashboard.ready_continue_desc: Pick up where you left off and complete your HR system design.

steps.diagnosis_desc: Input company information, business profile, workforce details, and organizational culture.
steps.job_analysis_desc: Define job roles, responsibilities, competencies, and organizational mapping.
steps.performance_desc: Design evaluation units, performance management methods, and assessment structures.
steps.compensation_desc: Define compensation structure, differentiation methods, and incentive components.
steps.final_dashboard_desc: Design Progress summary — review all stages and submit for CEO approval.

completion.title: Completion Notification
completion.line1_prefix: The initial HR system design for
completion.line2: Once the consultant review and final report upload are finished, a separate email notification will be sent to the HR Manager of {{company}}.

comment.title: Consultant Brief Comment
comment.empty: No comment has been added yet.

missing_report.title: Report Not Uploaded Yet
missing_report.description: A consultant is reviewing your company's entire design draft and writing a report. An alarm email will be sent to the HR manager upon completion, so please refer to this.

contact.title: Contact Consultant
contact.description: Please contact your consultant or admin team for revision requests before final confirmation.

final_confirm.title: Proceed with Final Confirmation?
final_confirm.description: Once you proceed with final confirmation, the current HR system will be officially established, and further modifications or consultant review will no longer be available.

executives.card_desc: Select the applicable executive positions and enter the number of people

hero.title: Diagnosis Overview
hero.subtitle: Provide company information and organizational context. Complete each step in sequence to build a foundation for your HR system design.
hero.notice_desc: In this step you will enter company basics, industry, workforce composition, organizational structure, and HR issues. This data will be used for job analysis, performance, and compensation design. All inputs are confidential.

company_info.name: Basic Info
company_info.desc: Company name, registration, HQ, industry, and listing status.

workforce.name: Workforce
workforce.desc: Present headcount, expected growth, tenure, age, and gender.

executives.name: Executives
executives.desc: Total executives and positions (e.g. CEO, CFO).

leaders.name: Leaders
leaders.desc: Leaders above team leader and share of workforce.

job_grades.name: Job Grades
job_grades.desc: Job grade names and promotion-in-grade structure.

org_charts.name: Org Charts
org_charts.desc: Upload organizational charts for required years.

hr_issues.name: HR Issues
hr_issues.desc: Key HR and organizational issues to address.

review.name: Review & Submit
review.desc: Final review and submission of diagnosis data.

company_info.companyInfoHeroDesc: Please enter your company's basic details. This information will be used throughout the HR diagnosis and system design.
company_info.logoUploadHint: This logo will be displayed in reports and diagnosis results (Optional)
company_info.fileTypeError: Only PNG and JPG files are allowed.
company_info.completion_description: You can move to the next step once all required fields are filled.

workforce.hero_desc: Please enter the current size, composition of employees, and future hiring plans.
workforce.include_all_hint: Please include all members, including dispatched and freelance workers.
workforce.ratio_text: The current composition is {{m}}% male and {{f}}% female.
workforce.gender_mismatch_warn: The sum of gender counts does not match the total headcount (Full-time + Contract).
workforce.forecast_card_desc: Enter the expected hiring scale according to the business roadmap by year.

diagnosis_executives.heroDesc: Select applicable executives and enter the number of people

diagnosis_leaders.title: Leaders
diagnosis_leaders.heroDesc: Select leadership roles above Team Leader level (excluding executives) and define headcount
diagnosis_leaders.noteDesc: Leaders are defined as employees above Team Leader level, excluding executives. Select each applicable leadership title and set the headcount.
diagnosis_leaders.validationExceeded: Leadership count ({{totalHead}}) cannot exceed total workforce ({{totalWorkforce}}). Please reduce headcount or increase total workforce.

diagnosis_job_grades.title: Grade Names, Promotion Duration & Expected Role
diagnosis_job_grades.heroDesc: Job grade names and promotion periods are editable. Expected role descriptions will be saved when modified.
diagnosis_job_grades.toolbarHint: Grade Name, Promotion Period, Headcount, and Expected Role can all be edited
diagnosis_job_grades.rolePlaceholder: Enter expected role and competencies for this grade...
diagnosis_job_grades.statusIdle: Enter headcounts to compare with total workforce
diagnosis_job_grades.statusUnder: Total headcount is less than workforce. Please adjust or use 'Distribute Evenly'.
diagnosis_job_grades.statusOver: Total headcount exceeds workforce. Please reduce some values.
diagnosis_job_grades.validationMismatch: Sum of headcounts by grade ({{totalHc}}) must equal total workforce ({{workforceTotal}}).

diagnosis_org_chart.title: Organizational Charts
diagnosis_org_chart.description: Please upload organizational charts for the following periods. You can upload JPG, PNG, or PDF files (max 10MB each).
diagnosis_org_chart.invalidFileType: Please upload a JPG, PNG, or PDF file.
diagnosis_org_chart.fileSizeLimit: File size must be less than 10MB.
diagnosis_org_chart.validationMissing: Upload organizational charts for all required years (2023.12, 2024.12, 2025.12).

diagnosis_org_structure.title: Organizational Structure
diagnosis_org_structure.description: Please select the type of organizational structure that best describes your company.

functional.name: Functional Organization
functional.desc: Teams are organized by functions such as Sales, Technology, and Management.

divisional.name: Divisional Organization
divisional.desc: Independent business units operate by product, brand, or region.

matrix.name: Matrix Organization
matrix.desc: Belong to a functional team while also reporting to a project leader simultaneously.

hq.name: Headquarters-Subsidiary Structure
hq.desc: Headquarters handles strategy while subsidiaries and branches manage field operations.

tft.name: TFT (Task Force)
tft.desc: Personnel are drawn from multiple teams for a specific goal and disbanded upon completion.

flat.name: Flat / Horizontal Organization
flat.desc: Minimized hierarchy where members report directly to the CEO.

undefined.name: Not Clearly Defined Yet
undefined.desc: No formal organizational structure exists or it has not been established yet.

diagnosis_org_structure.customSubtitle: If your structure is unique or a combination of the above, please provide more details.
diagnosis_org_structure.customPlaceholder: Please describe your organizational structure in detail...

diagnosis_job_structure.title: Job Structure
diagnosis_job_structure.description: Define job categories and their respective functions in your organization.
diagnosis_job_structure.noCategories: No categories yet. Add one to get started.
diagnosis_job_structure.selectCategoryLeft: Select a category from the left
diagnosis_job_structure.confirmRemoveCategory: Remove category "{{name}}" and all its functions?

diagnosis_hr_issues.title: Key HR / Organizational Issues
diagnosis_hr_issues.description: Please select the major HR and organizational issues your company is currently facing.

retention.name: Retention / Recruitment & Retention
retention.issue1: Does not bring in high-caliber leadership/management
retention.issue2: Did not bring in right people for key roles
retention.issue3: Did not bring in enough people in same dimension
retention.issue4: High turnover in specific roles / teams
retention.issue5: High turnover with less than 1 year of employment
retention.issue6: High turnover with less than 3 or more years of employment

org.name: Org Structure / Organizational Structure
org.issue2: Unclear responsibilities between two or more positions
org.issue3: Org structure does not enable business to change
org.issue4: Excessive span of control (too many direct reports)
org.issue10: Org structure doesn't form at all stages
org.issue11: Grow all directions at all ages

culture.name: Culture / Organizational Culture
culture.issue1: Top-down culture and low freedom of leadership style
culture.issue2: Lack of clear defined key success measures and competencies
culture.issue3: Unclear how employees are recognised and why
culture.issue4: Does not manage teams' leadership capability

reward.name: Reward / Compensation System
reward.issue1: Pay too evolved that it is not in a system
reward.issue2: Same pay across levels that pushes talent out
reward.issue3: Pay not linked to performance or contribution
reward.issue4: Pay gap between line and new employees
reward.issue5: Lack of reward for high performers
reward.issue6: Excessive overload that is not rewarded
reward.issue7: No clear ownership of reward decisions

upskilling.name: Upskilling / Competency Development
upskilling.issue1: Few employees at all levels have learning and development set
upskilling.issue2: Limited budget for learning and development
upskilling.issue4: Lack of steps or programs to become a manager

diagnosis_hr_issues.customPlaceholder: Please describe any other HR/organizational issues...
